caption: A video displays a gaming interface titled "UNOPENED PACKS" across the top of the screen. The interface features several digital card packs with glowing gems and figures, including labels such as "LOVELY PRESENT x1", "BLITZ PRESENT x1", and "KRAMPUS LOGIN PACK x1". At the top right, various currency values and a level indicator, "LV 19", are visible. In the bottom-left corner, a small picture-in-picture window shows a man with blond hair wearing a dark navy blue t-shirt. He is situated in a room with white walls and a blue accent wall featuring a framed piece of art. As the video progresses, the man speaks and moves his head slightly while the gaming menu remains static. A "BACK" button with a red icon is visible at the bottom of the menu.
